name: The eyeless husk
description:
SℲW ¡ntro

In a nightmare that knows no release, A future unyielding, devoid of peace. A cycle of torment, a cruel, endless churn, For a slumbering soul, that will never learn. Eyeless he watches, the shadows that creep,Into corners of spirit, where dark secrets sleep.

Credits to v-135 guy for the art

And special thanks to @Kandystars for the recommendation
